case_title: ONE THOUSAND GREEN COMPANY, A CAL/CORP vs. MONTGONERY, MARGARET et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF ONE THOUSAND GREEN COMPANY, A CAL/CORP

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONTGONERY, MARGARET THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1000 GREEN STREET, APARTMENT 205, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $9,725.81 RENT, $1,300.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,025.81, STAYED UNTIL OCT-31-2000, LEASE FORFEITED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ONE THOUSAND GREEN COMPANY, A CAL/CORP SERVED SEP-27-2000, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT MONTGONERY, MARGARET
